items.title: Finite temperature effects on g-modes of inviscid neutron stars
items.summary: arXiv:2604.11815v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study the effect of temperature on secular, compositional $g$-modes in the core of inviscid neutron stars. Using a chiral $SU(2)_f$ sigma model, we construct isentropic temperature profiles for hot and dense matter and find that…

items.title: JWST Observations of Starbursts: Dust Processing in the M82 Superwind
